about.title: TdyTime
about.description: Smart teaching schedule manager for lecturers at the University of Medicine and Pharmacy, Hue University.
about.note: Note: Theory (LT) periods are 45 minutes each. Practice/Integrated (TH) periods are 60 minutes each.

changes: TypeBadge System: Standardized LT/TH display using a centralized configuration, eliminating redundant code.
Auto Practice Detection: Automatically classifies 'TT ' (Internship/Practice) courses as Practical (TH) during parsing.
Layout Stabilization: Fixed T2-T7 column widths and implemented overflow containment in Semester view to prevent card overlap.
Session Card Normalization: Enforced uniform card heights by strictly controlling subject line-clamping.
Theme Picker Pro: Replaced the sequence-based theme toggle with a professional color picker menu featuring 7 new palettes.
Semester Alignment: Standardized the 48px grid on Semester view to match Weekly view, creating a cohesive professional SaaS look.
Sticky Navigation: Added sticky headers to long schedules for better readability.
Tech Stack Upgrade: Upgraded TypeScript 6.0 and core libraries (Zustand, React Router, Vite) to the latest stable versions.
Architecture Focus: Fully decoupled Domain Logic (Session cards & Period Standards) from Generic UI, making the codebase 100% easier to maintain.
Shared UI Architecture: Refactored Weekly & Semester views to use shared components (WeekTableLayout, WeekCardLayout), ensuring 100% visual consistency.
Performance Optimization: Optimized Semester view rendering with pre-calculated filters and React.memo, enabling smooth interaction even with dozens of weeks expanded.
Bug Fixes & Stability: Resolved unique key collisions and optimized teacher recognition logic, reducing navigation delay to Statistics/Settings tabs to near-zero.
Performance Boost (Zero-Dep SVG): Replaced Recharts with custom SVG components, reducing bundle size by 374KB and improving LCP from 7.0s to 1.8s (74% faster).
Stats UI Refinement: New GitHub-style Heatmap grid with abbreviated day labels (Mon-Sun), and updated shift charts with smooth light-to-dark color scales.
Data Precision: Standardized 0.0% formatting and implemented a remainder-balancing algorithm to ensure chart segments always total exactly 100.0%.
UI Optimization: Refined statistics card layouts and synchronized all time-based labels (DAY/WEEK/MONTH).
Theme Picker UI: Replaced the sequence-based theme toggle with a professional color picker menu for instant workspace personalization.
Accent Palettes+: Added 7 premium color themes (Blue, Green, Pink, Violet, Red, Yellow, Grey) with synchronized UI accents.
StatsHeader Evolution: Redesigned the statistics header with collapsible sections and perfect grid alignment.
Official Release v1.0.0: Finalized PWA system with proactive update checking.
Improved PWA Experience: Added manual update check in Settings and smart install prompts.
Brand Identity: Synchronized SVG logos across Welcome and Settings views.
UI Optimization: Refined logo sizing and spacing for a cleaner, modern interface.
Lightning Fast Performance: Comprehensive optimization achieving instant load times (~176ms) and absolute performance scores.
Smart Bundle Split: Intelligent separation of heavy libraries (Charts) from the main thread, ensuring a smooth experience from the first touch.
Dynamic Layout Loading: On-demand interface loading mechanism (Lazy Loading) saves data and accelerates display speed.
Header UI Evolution: Integrated a minimalist Dark Mode toggle directly into the Header for faster access and as a clear visual update indicator.
Hard Refresh Signal: Structural Header changes to force mobile browsers to recognize the update and bypass persistent PWA caching.
PWA Self-Healing: Forced cache refresh mechanism to resolve the persistent greeting issue on mobile devices.
Timezone Reactive: Optimized system timezone detection for instant Morning/Afternoon/Evening updates.
Smart Countdown: Visual countdown system for upcoming semesters with 2-digit formatting and color-coded dynamic titles.
Today View Optimized: Unified LIVE/Pending card designs and consolidated completed session lists for a cleaner layout.
Multi-Teacher Footer: New 'Footer Strip' design for teacher names, automatically visible when filters are cleared for multi-faculty view.
Minimalist UI Refinement: Shortened week date ranges with arrow symbols (→) and optimized mobile padding for better focus.
Scroll & Layout Fix: Removed non-functional scroll indicators and resolved redundant vertical scrolling issues on the Today tab.
PageSpeed 90+: Optimized performance to meet Core Web Vitals standards (LCP < 2.5s).
Accessibility Verified: Achieved WCAG AA color contrast compliance and verified ARIA navigation support.
Smart Cache: Intelligent caching mechanism for instant app loading.
PWA Pro: Upgraded with maskable icons and manifest calibration for a native app experience.
Premium Refinement: Optimized the Settings and Statistics views for better visual balance and information density.
Auto-Logic: Implemented intelligent course type assignment and automatic name shortening across all views.
Stability Pro: Fixed navigation edge cases and improved code robustness for a smoother experience.
Data-Centric Today: Complete redesign of the Today tab with data-first philosophy, optimized for instructors and senior users.
Session Status System: Three-tier session status (Upcoming / In Progress / Completed) with clear visual distinction.
Semester Intelligence: Smart semester boundary detection with 4 specialized empty states.
Mobile-First Cards: Optimized 3-column mobile layout (Time | Info | Room) with standardized display priority.
System Refactor: Comprehensive code audit and refactoring, achieving 100% logic safety and stability.
Performance Core: Optimized rendering performance with Memoization technology, eliminating calculation bottlenecks.
Clean Utilities: Standardized date processing (ScheduleUtils), reducing 30% code duplication and enhancing reliability.
Smart Filtering: Intuitive filtering system that auto-hides for cleaner focus, featuring active indicators.
Privacy Mode: Flexible security feature on the Stats page to conceal detailed metrics when needed.
Mobile Horizontal Scrolling: Standardized horizontal scroll experience for weekly schedules on mobile devices.
Visual Unification: Comprehensive synchronization of 2xl border radius and UI terminology across the app.
Premium Minimal Language: Elegant and refined design philosophy featuring Glassmorphism and data-centric layouts.
Semester Timeline: All-new semester timeline experience with smart navigation and space optimization.
Insights Card: Next-gen analytical cards transforming raw data into vibrant, actionable insights.
Visual Performance: Optimized fluid transaction effects for a premium native app feel.
Welcome Center: Reimagined landing space built on professional app standards with aesthetic TdyTime branding.
Conflict Intelligence: Automated analytical engine detecting time and space overlaps for 100% schedule accuracy.
Smart History: Instant memory and access for recent schedules, eliminating the need for data re-uploads.
Interface Polish: Refined UI components (Tabs, Toasts, Badges) for unified completion.
Mobile Prowess: Redefined mobile experience with intuitive bottom Tab Bar and natural swipe navigation.
Identity Refresh: Updated icons and splash screens following modern PWA standards.
Dashboard Insights: Upgraded distribution charts and summary cards for 3-second schedule grasp.
Executive Dashboard: Full redesign of the Statistics view towards clean management aesthetics.
Color-Coded Alerts: Visual alert system using color language to identify hotspots and overload weeks instantly.
The Blue Revolution: Standardized professional Blue/Teal color palette, eliminating legacy design inconsistencies.
Skeleton Shimmer: Integrated modern loading effects for an uninterrupted user experience.
Analytics Launch: First-ever teaching density analysis system with intuitive Heatmap visualizations.
Parser Engine: Upgraded data processing engine for high-accuracy UMS system integration.
Genesis: Foundation architecture established, focusing on raw schedule parsing into digital formats.

success.loadedCurrent: Data loaded successfully! Navigating to current week.

error.parseNoWeeks: ⚠️ No weekly data could be extracted.

pwa.install_desc: Add the app to your home screen to access your teaching schedule offline.
